name: Landing Page And Creative Experiment
description: Design a measurable experiment that connects creative, landing pages, and business goals.
whenToUse: Use this when you want to design a measurable experiment that connects creative, landing pages, and business goals.
Best for growth and paid media teams that want repeatable work without changing the tools they already use.

stages.title: Orient From Experiment History
stages.summary: Read existing experiments, related resources, prior lessons, and current inputs.

stages.title: Define Experiment Setup
stages.summary: Define the variant set, metric targets, observation windows, and stopping rules.

stages.title: Record Experiment
stages.summary: Persist the experiment setup before any campaign or ad changes.

stages.title: Optional Launch Update
stages.summary: Execute approved campaign or ad updates only when granted by the concrete plan.
